LanguageData.WestTek_FaunaMutation.description: Push the same early mutation work into animal hosts, establishing stable nonhuman FEV handling.
LanguageData.WestTek_FaunaMutation.label: fauna mutation
LanguageData.WestTek_FaunaMutation2.description: Force the S'Lanter genome into a Skinwalker-capable state, granting controlled access to an unstable transformation form.
LanguageData.WestTek_FaunaMutation2.label: forced mutation
LanguageData.WestTek_FaunaMutation3.description: Domesticate S'Lanter-derived subjects into a stable S'Nuffy fauna line and unlock specialized genome packages.
LanguageData.WestTek_FaunaMutation3.label: forced domestication
LanguageData.WestTek_FEV1.description: Catalog the first stable Forced Evolutionary Virus handling process. This research only becomes available after a colonist analyzes an FEV probe.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEV1.label: FEV-1
LanguageData.WestTek_FEV2.description: Refine the first-generation process into reliable sample handling and cleaner dosage production. This research only becomes available after a colonist analyzes an FEV sample.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEV2.label: FEV-2
LanguageData.WestTek_FEV3.description: Stabilize isolated Forced Evolutionary Virus cultures for controlled colonist-facing procedures. This research only becomes available after a colonist analyzes an FEV culture.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEV3.label: FEV-3
LanguageData.WestTek_FlatwormMutation.description: Probe low-order mutation pathways using resilient flatworm tissue. This crude foundation lets West Tek culture living FEV growth without immediately escalating to full humanoid conversion work.
LanguageData.WestTek_FlatwormMutation.label: flatworm mutation
LanguageData.WestTek_FloraMutation.description: Adapt early FEV culture techniques into living plant symbiotes and surgical flora prostheses.
LanguageData.WestTek_FloraMutation.label: flora mutation
LanguageData.WestTek_FloraMutation2.description: Weaponize plant-host mutation into contagious Spore Carriers that can spread flora mutation through direct infection.
LanguageData.WestTek_FloraMutation2.label: forced pollination
LanguageData.WestTek_FloraMutation3.description: Cultivate stable humanoid flora strains, transforming compatible humans with exactly one plant symbiote into Numen.
LanguageData.WestTek_FloraMutation3.label: forced cultivation
